projectDescription: A headless terminal that lets AI agents, automation scripts, and CI pipelines drive interactive TUI and CLI programs by reading the rendered screen and sending keystrokes.
keyFeatures: Headless PTY sessions that persist across invocations via a background server
Named sessions with UUIDv7 identifiers and prefix resolution
Read the rendered screen with `hty snapshot` including full ANSI styling
Send text, named keys, or raw hex bytes to any running session
Wait primitives: block until text appears, screen goes idle, or process exits
Live session observation with `hty watch` (read-only streaming)
Append-only JSONL session event logs with `hty logs` and `hty replay`
Remote observation via `$HTY_SOCKET` and SSH tunnels
Built on Ghostty's VT engine for accurate terminal emulation
publicApiSurface: HTY_SOCKET environment variable for custom/remote socket path
Wire protocol ops: spawn, list, snapshot, send_text, send_key, send_bytes_hex, resize, wait_for_text, wait_for_idle, wait_for_exit, kill, delete, attach
